subcodes.first_line: Thy missive hath become the cause of joy and the dilation of the hearts of them that are endued with understanding. We cherish the hope that under the shadow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب علت فرح و انبساط قلوب اولی الالباب گشت امیدواریم لازال در ظل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for protection, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
